Class TreeDragStartedEventArgs

Provides data for the OnDragStarting(ITree, TreeDragStartedEventArgs).

object
EventArgs
TreeDragStartedEventArgs

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class TreeDragStartedEventArgs : EventArgs
Remarks

This event is raised when a drag operation is initiated from the ITree control.

The subscriber is responsible for:

  • Creating and assigning an IDataObject to DataObject.
  • Specifying allowed drag operations using AllowedEffects.

If AllowedEffects is set to None, the drag operation is canceled.

Constructors

TreeDragStartedEventArgs(ITreeNode, IReadOnlyCollection<ITreeNode>)

Initializes a new instance of the TreeDragStartedEventArgs class.

Declaration
public TreeDragStartedEventArgs(ITreeNode node, IReadOnlyCollection<ITreeNode> nodes)
Parameters
Type Name Description
ITreeNode node

The node where the drag operation was initiated.
IReadOnlyCollection<ITreeNode> nodes

The collection of nodes being dragged.

Properties

AllowedEffects

Gets or sets the drag-and-drop operations allowed by the source.

Declaration
public DragDropEffects AllowedEffects { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
DragDropEffects
Remarks

Set this property to one or more values from DragDropEffects. Setting it to None cancels the drag operation.

DataObject

Gets or sets the data associated with the drag operation.

Declaration
public IDataObject DataObject { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
IDataObject
Remarks

Assign a valid IDataObject before the drag operation proceeds.

Node

Gets the node where the drag operation started.

Declaration
public ITreeNode Node { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
ITreeNode

Nodes

Gets the collection of nodes participating in the drag operation.

Declaration
public IEnumerable<ITreeNode> Nodes { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IEnumerable<ITreeNode>
